channel.title: Self-Taught Developer on simeononsecurity

item.title: Education and Certifications for Software Developers
item.category: "software developer education" , "coding bootcamp vs degree" , "developer certifications" , "computer science degree" , "self-taught developer"
item.description: Compare degrees, bootcamps, self-teaching, and developer certifications to find the education path that fits your goals and budget.
